title: Banquito
description: changing the vanilla game in a friendly way with multiplayer in mind, made for Banquito server
body:
# **old description**

_hecho para el servidor BanquitoFabric_

optimized with [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) config files

modpack vanilla plus con cambios para ofrecer una mejor experiencia multijugador siendo mayormente de bajo rendimiento en el servidor.

Cambios en la generacion del terreno para que se vea mas diferente al estilo vanilla, nuevas animaciones en la camara de primera y tercera persona con Shoulder Surfing Reloaded.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90372063fce14ff46775772a46876fe8df816ec1.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cb9855e846e9b239a2be6ff0a541861359f447.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77ad4473ed0b877cf80eb05624e7f60ccff8d152.png)
terraria like changes:
- [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul)

Client-side mods

- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Particle Interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions)

shaders
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader)
- [Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)

resourcepacks

- [Retextured Dyes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/retextured-dye)
- [Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shrimps-immersive-interfaces)
- [Tender Dragon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tender-dragon)
- [Torches Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torches-reimagined)
- [Visual: Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-armor-trims)
- [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)
- [Assorted Allays x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/assorted-allays-x-fresh-animations)
- [Angel's Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/angels-weather)
- [GUISe](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-sodium)
- [Panorama da casa automática com REI-Reymagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/panorama-da-casa-automatica-com-rei-reymagined)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)

_old versions descriptions_ 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

made for Banquito HQ server

enchanced vanilla gameplay with new structures, biomes, and items to discover. Multiplayer focused experience: voice chat, essensial emotes, tpa commands and Anti-xray.

- [WATERFrAMES](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes): _Multimedia Displays_
- [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting): _paint your own paintings_
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure): _camera mod_

resourcepacks:
- [Assorted Allays](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/assorted-allays-x-fresh-animations) 
- [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- [Programmer Art Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fix)
- [Visual Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-armor-trims)
- [Tender Dragon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tender-dragon)
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) / [Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion)
- [TU5 Tutorial World Panorama](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tu5-tutorial-world-panorama)
- [ClassicCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-craft)

Shaders:
- [Rudimentary](https://modrinth.com/shader/rudimentary-ps1) A PS1 Styled Shader meant for casual gameplay.
- [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader) Extremely lightweight with shadows and reflections
- [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - Reimagined Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance.
- [ BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) It's bright, colorful, and distinct.
- [Bloop Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bloop-shaders) designed to deliver excellent graphics while maximizing performance


</details>
